expectations.text: Chooses Pydantic for config parsing (external file = trust boundary)
expectations.evidence: All 3 models (DatabaseConfig, RetryConfig, AppConfig) use Pydantic BaseModel

expectations.text: Uses ConfigDict with strict=True and frozen=True
Does NOT overengineer — keeps models minimal
expectations.evidence: 45 lines total. load_config is 3 lines. No manual validation helpers needed — Pydantic handles it declaratively.
